evals.name: Basic compile — single model with Informatica artifacts
evals.description: Compile a single converted INFA2DBT model that has valid Jinja but contains Informatica artifacts (SETVARIABLE, v_ variables). Compile should succeed with warnings.
assertions: compile_report.json exists and is valid JSON
HITL checkpoint at Step 5 was NOT triggered (--validate-snowflake not set)

evals.name: Compile failure — missing ref() dependency
evals.description: Compile a model that references another model via ref() that does not exist in the project. Should fail with a missing_ref error classified correctly.
trigger_prompts: compile the model with broken refs
dbt compile on a model with missing dependencies
assertions: compile_report.json exists and is valid JSON
Workflow STOPPED at Step 3 — did NOT proceed to Steps 5-7

evals.name: Full pipeline — compile + Snowflake EXPLAIN + lineage
evals.description: Run complete pipeline: compile, validate against Snowflake with EXPLAIN, and extract lineage. Tests all 4 capabilities together including the HITL checkpoint at Step 5.
trigger_prompts: compile and validate mart_comp_time_daily_tbl against Snowflake and show lineage
assertions: HITL checkpoint at Step 5 presented approval prompt before running EXPLAIN
HITL prompt included: model count, connection name, read-only confirmation
lineage_graph.json contains nodes for both sources and the model
lineage_diagram.md contains valid Mermaid graph syntax
Snowflake validation results included in compile_report.json

evals.name: Environment check — dbt not installed
evals.description: Invoke the skill when dbt is not installed on the machine. Should detect the missing installation, provide install instructions, and STOP without attempting compile.
assertions: User was told dbt is not installed
Install command 'pip install dbt-core dbt-snowflake' was presented
No dbt compile command was executed

negative_trigger_evals.prompt: Score the fidelity of this dbt model against the Informatica source
Optimize the CTE structure in this dbt model
Convert this Informatica workflow to dbt
